scripts.build:chrome: vite build --outDir ../../dist/chrome && TARGET_BROWSER=chrome OUT_DIR=../../dist/chrome bun scripts/build-manifest.js
scripts.build:firefox: TARGET_BROWSER=firefox ENTRY_NAME=background vite build --outDir ../../dist/firefox && TARGET_BROWSER=firefox ENTRY_NAME=content_script vite build --outDir ../../dist/firefox && TARGET_BROWSER=firefox OUT_DIR=../../dist/firefox bun scripts/build-manifest.js
scripts.build: bun run build:chrome && bun run build:firefox
